creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just ran a testport with poudriere and PYTHON on.  It ran cleanly on 10.2:

http://services.unixathome.org/poudriere/data/102amd64-clean/2015-10-13_15h36m34s/logs/bacula-server-7.2.0.log

Perhaps we are missing some other error which occurs farther up in the output?

I am trying to discover if this is particular to 11.x
